title: gastrochilus violaceus
intro: Gastrochilus violaceus, also known as the Violet Lip Orchid, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gastrochilus violaceus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used to treat various ailments.
